summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine - Chart Integration project. All major functionality is working correctly: backend health endpoints (100% success rate), frontend loads properly at /tech-analysis, all 5 tabs work (Research, Structure, Signals, Execution, Deep), chart loads with candlestick data, timeframe switching works (4H, 1D, 7D, 1M, 6M, 1Y), pattern detection shows Symmetrical Triangle, overlay buttons work (Fib, Pattern, Setup, TA). The underscore formatting issue has been resolved - text displays correctly with spaces instead of underscores.
